text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, the groundskeeping committee is
conducting its monthly academy cleanup. Nishino
Flower and Grass Wonder are doing their rounds.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: You needn't be so nervous, Flower.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I-I know... but today's the groundskeeping
committee's big day.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I have to do my best so that everyone will
understand the importance of keeping the
academy spick-and-span!
choice_data_list: (I wonder if she'll be all right.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower appears far more fired up than
usual. I'm a little concerned, so I decide to keep
an eye on her from a distance.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Hey, I was using that broom!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
I don't see your name on it! Just go get another
one.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: U-um... Excuse me...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: I was in the middle of sweeping already, so why do I have to go? You go get another one!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Umm... Please stop fighting...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: A word, if I may?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for being so passionate about keeping
our academy looking pristine. However...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Beautiful landscapes are created by beautiful
hearts. Let's cease this bickering and work
together toward our goal.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Well, that about does it for our rounds. All that's
left is...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um... Grass? Thank you for what you did back
there! How, um...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
How can I become as good as you are at dealing
with others?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I want to be a dependable Umamusume who
everyone can count on!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thank you for the compliment. Everything
comes down to experience, but if I had to say...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
First, you should stand tall and speak with
confidence. People are bound to lend an ear to a
dignified speaker.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Next—and this is the most important thing...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
You need to convey the passion that you hold
toward cleaning. ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: The passion I have?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Yes. If you can manage that, you'll be just fine.
Now, the slackers tend to gather on the roof.
Shall we pay them a visit?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text: ...Tch.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(Oh, it's an upperclassman... And she looks
angry... But I have to stay firm.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um! Please get back to cleaning!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text:
Why? It's not like I'd make much of a difference
anyway.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
...We can't expect to produce great results unless
we maintain a great environment!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
And I believe you have to create that
environment yourself! You can't simply sit there
and expect others to do it for you.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: So...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'd appreciate it if you'd go back to your assigned
space and start cleaning, please!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Fine. Who am I to argue in the face of that passion...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
We're done for the day. You handled yourself
well back there, Flower.
Don't you agree, Trainer?
choice_data_list: ...You knew I was here the whole time?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um... Wait, have you been watching me from the
start?
choice_data_list: Yup. You were so cool back there!
Yup. You were so cool back there!
You delivered some great words of wisdom.
You delivered some great words of wisdom.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um... Wait, have you been watching me from the
start?
choice_data_list: Yup. You were so cool back there!
Yup. You were so cool back there!
You delivered some great words of wisdom.
You delivered some great words of wisdom.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you very much!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But... I've still got a long way to go before I can
catch up to Grass!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
She's gentle and soft-spoken, but everyone hears
her loud and clear... That's how I want to be!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Goodness, if you're using me as inspiration, then
I'll have to pay closer attention to my own
conduct.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: O-oh, I didn't mean to put pressure on you!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe, that's not what I'm saying. I was simply
implying that we should both give it our best.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: O-okay! You can count on me to give it my all!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: D-do you really think so?! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
That phrase came to me in the middle of a race,
actually.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
The well-kept turf felt great under my cleats, and
I was beating all my old times...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
That's when it hit me! "A great environment leads
to great results."

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I see. I suppose I've learned something today as
well.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh gosh, that's nothing compared to what you
taught me! I truly appreciate it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems they both learned something important
from one another.
